title: coreutils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[8.30-16.0.1]
- clean up empty file if cp is failed [Orabug 15973168]
- df --local: recognize afs, auristorfs, and smb3 as remote fs (#1798030)
- fix formatting of sha512sum(1) man page (#1688744)

[8.30-16]
- fix du being killed by SIGABRT on mutating xfs systems (RHEL-124174)
full_text:
[8.30-16.0.1]
- clean up empty file if cp is failed [Orabug 15973168]
- df --local: recognize afs, auristorfs, and smb3 as remote fs (#1798030)
- fix formatting of sha512sum(1) man page (#1688744)

[8.30-16]
- fix du being killed by SIGABRT on mutating xfs systems (RHEL-124174)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23380.html
